---
title: "Cleaning data for occurrence and community databases" "Database #1" 
subtitle: 'EpIG volunteership'
format: html
editor: visual
date: today
author: "Juana Daniela Ruiz Carreño" 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#georef__assis_i_2026_specieslink

```{r}
# Cargar librerias y revisar información

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringi)

spp_link <- read.csv("C:/VOLUNTARIADO/EpIG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__assis_i_2026_specieslink.csv")

head(spp_link)
view(spp_link)
str(spp_link)
```

#Crear columnas de cambios

```{r}
# make sure ok.2 exists
if (!"ok.2" %in% names(spp_link)) spp_link$ok.2 <- spp_link$.ok_for_analysis #Verificación de la existencia del nombre ok.2, si no existe que se cree

# make sure discardReason exists
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(spp_link)) spp_link$discardReason <- ""
```

# Revisar cada una de las columnas

```{r}
unique(spp_link$country)
unique(spp_link$countryCode)
unique(spp_link$stateProvince)
unique(spp_link$locality)
unique(spp_link$changes)

```

#Detectar información dañada en "stateProvince"

```{r}
conteo_province <- spp_link %>%
  count(stateProvince, sort = TRUE)

conteo_province
```

#Corregir letras con signos raros

```{r}
spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Amap�", "Amapa", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Cear�", "Ceara", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Esp�rito Santo", "Espirito Santo", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Goi�s", "Goias", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Maranh�o", "Maranhao", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Par�", "Para", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Paran�", "Parana", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Piau�", "Piaui", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("Rond�nia", "Rondonia", spp_link$stateProvince)

spp_link$stateProvince <- gsub("S�o Paulo", "Sao Paulo", spp_link$stateProvince)

# Cambio 1

camb1_spplink <- c("Amapa","Ceara","Espirito Santo","Goias","Maranhao","Para","Parana","Piaui","Rondonia","Sao Paulo")

idx <- which(spp_link$stateProvince %in% camb1_spplink)

spp_link$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
spp_link$discardReason[idx] <- "change: stateProvince names corrected./"

```

#Completar los espacios vacios

```{r}

# 1.Crear objeto para revisar los espacios vacios en stateProvince 
stateProvince_vacios <- spp_link %>%
  filter(stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) %>%
  select(stateProvince, locality, occurrenceID)

stateProvince_vacios

# 2. Completar el stateProvince basado en palabras de locality 

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(stateProvince = case_when(
    (stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) & grepl("Bom Jardim", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Rio de Janeiro",
    (stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) & grepl("Santana do Pirapama", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Minas Gerais",
    (stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) & grepl("Mato Grosso", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Mato Grosso",
    (stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) & grepl("Fazenda Santa Maria", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Parana",
    TRUE ~ stateProvince 
  ),
  discardReason = case_when(
    grepl("Bom Jardim", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ paste(discardReason, "change: corrected stateProvince using locality /"),
    grepl("Santana do Pirapama", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ paste(discardReason, "change: corrected stateProvince using locality /"),
    grepl("Mato Grosso", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ paste(discardReason, "change: corrected stateProvince using locality /"),
    grepl("Fazenda Santa Maria", locality, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ paste(discardReason, "change: corrected stateProvince using locality /"),
    TRUE ~ discardReason
  )
  )


# 3. Completar el stateProvince basado en occurrenceID

oID_vacios <- c("assis_i_2026_specieslink_00633", "assis_i_2026_specieslink_00636", "assis_i_2026_specieslink_00894", "assis_i_2026_specieslink_01280", "assis_i_2026_specieslink_01540")

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(stateProvince = ifelse((stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)) & occurrenceID %in% oID_vacios,
                                "Rio de Janeiro",
                                stateProvince),
  discardReason = ifelse(occurrenceID %in% oID_vacios,
                           paste(ifelse(is.na(discardReason) | discardReason == "", "",
                                        discardReason),
                                 "change: corrected stateProvince using occurrenceID /"
                                 ),
                           discardReason)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    stateProvince = ifelse(occurrenceID == "assis_i_2026_specieslink_00691" & (stateProvince == "" | is.na(stateProvince)),
                                "Sao Paulo",
                                stateProvince),
  discardReason = ifelse(occurrenceID == "assis_i_2026_specieslink_00691",
                           paste(ifelse(is.na(discardReason) | discardReason == "", "",
                                        discardReason),
                                 "change: corrected stateProvince using specific occurrenceID /"
                                 ),
                           discardReason)
  )

```

#Detectar información dañada en "locality"

```{r}
conteo_locality <- spp_link %>%
  count(locality, sort = TRUE)

conteo_locality
```

#Detectar información en locality que tiene coordenadas

```{r}

# Detectar filas con coordenadas en locality

locality_coords <- spp_link %>%
  filter(
    # formato grados, minutos, segundos
    grepl("\\d+°\\d+'\\d+\"[SNOW]", locality) |
    # grados y minutos
    grepl("\\d+°\\d+'\\d+[SNOW]", locality) |
    # decimales con N/S/E/O/W
    grepl("\\d+\\.\\d+\\s*[SNOW]", locality) |
    # decimales con signo (ej: -53.9058 / -27.2002)
    grepl("-?\\d+\\.\\d+\\s*/\\s*-?\\d+\\.\\d+", locality)
  ) %>%
  select(locality, occurrenceID, stateProvince, decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude)

locality_coords


```

#Arreglar información con coordenadas en locality

```{r}
#Agregar coordenadas faltantes a las columnas de long y lat

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    decimalLongitude = ifelse(occurrenceID == "assis_i_2026_specieslink_01528",
                              "-53.331000", decimalLongitude),
    decimalLatitude  = ifelse(occurrenceID == "assis_i_2026_specieslink_01528",
                              "-27.081000", decimalLatitude)
  )

# Eliminar datos de elevación

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all("\\b\\d+\\s*m\\.?\\s*alt\\b", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\b\\d+\\s*m\\s*elev\\b", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)elev\\.?[:]?\\s*\\d+\\s*m?", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)alt[:]?\\s*\\d+\\s*m?", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)\\balt\\.?\\b", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)aprox\\.\\s*\\d+\\s*msm", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\b\\d+\\s*msm\\b", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\b\\d+\\s*m\\b", "") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

#Eliminar palabras raras o letras sueltas

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all(";\\s*O", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\bm\\s*\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\"\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\";\\s*\"", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("°\\s*\\d+'\\d+\"+", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)\\.\\s*Altitudes a\\s*\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.:\\s*/\\d+''", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.:\\s*/''K", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)Altitudes entre:\\s*a\\s*\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)Altitudes entre\\s*a", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\b26\\.060100\\s*s\\b", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\"\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*'$", "") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

#Eliminar coordenadas dentro de las filas de locality

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(\\d+°\\s*\\d+'\\s*\\d+(?:[.,]\\d+)?\"?\\s*[NSOEW])", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(\\d+°\\s*\\d+'?\\s*[NSOEW])", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(\\d+[.,]\\d+\\s*[NSOEW])", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\d{1,3}°\\s*\\d{1,2}", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(\\d+\\s*[NSOEW])", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(\\d+''\\s*[NSOEW])", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(-?\\d+[.,]\\d+\\s*/\\s*-?\\d+[.,]\\d+)", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(Coord\\.:\\s*[^ ]+)", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("(?i)(Coordenadas entre[^ ]+)", "") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

# Eliminar caracteres de coordenadas especificos

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.0", "") %>%                 
      str_replace_all("\\.0',\\s*,0',", "") %>%      
      str_replace_all(",\\s*O", "") %>%               
      str_replace_all(";\\s*O", "") %>%               
      str_replace_all("\\b14\\.4\\b", "") %>%         
      str_replace_all("\\b45\\.9\\b", "") %>%         
      str_replace_all("52,,35,,", "") %>%             
      str_replace_all("12,\\s*,49,,", "") %>%         
      str_replace_all("17,,\\s*43,\\.", "") %>%       
      str_replace_all("S\\s*43[,;]\\s*S\\s*43[,;]\\s*S\\s*38", "") %>% 
      str_replace_all("1142,\\.", "") %>%             
      str_replace_all("06\\.,\\s*05\\.,", "") %>%     
      str_replace_all("45\\.,\\s*06\\.,", "") %>%     
      str_replace_all("\\.25", "") %>%                
      str_replace_all("27º00'01\"S\\s*\\.", "") %>% 
      str_replace_all("27º16'\\s*50º07'\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all(",0'", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("51\\.,\\s*59\\.,", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("22k\\s*0583716\\s*7362319", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("22k\\s*050\\s*3716\\s*7362319", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'04\\.\\s*5\"s\\.\\s*40\\.\\s*7\"w", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'47\\.\\s*6\"s", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("18°s\\.\\s*43°w", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.\\s*\"S", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\"42\\.\\s*1\"w\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\"24\\.\\s*06079\"w\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'52\\.\\s*'35\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.'", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("S\\s*43\\.\\s*S\\s*43\\.\\s*S\\s*'38\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'\\s*\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*'\\s*\\d{1,3}\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\d+\\.\\s*\\d+°\\s*[nsweNSWE]\\.?\\s*\\d+\\.\\s*\\d+°\\s*[nsweNSWE]\\.?","") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*1$", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'$", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*\\d{1,2}\"[NSns]\\.?\\s*\\.\\s*\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*\\d{1,2}\"[EWew]", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*\\d{1,2}\"[NSns]", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'\\s*06\\.\\s*'\\s*05\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*'\\d{1,3}", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("'16\\.", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("27º16'\\s*50º07'56\\.\\s*03\"[OoWw]", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("S\\s*\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*S\\s*\\d{1,3}\\.\\s*S\\s*'\\d{1,3}", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("27º16'30\\.\\s*01\"s\\s*50º07'56\\.\\s*03\"o", "") %>%
      str_squish()
  )


```

#Limpiar información en locality

```{r}
# Poner la primera palabra en mayusculas

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(locality = sub("^([[:alpha:]])", "\\U\\1", locality, perl = TRUE))

# Eliminar puntos, comas o punto/coma que esten varias veces y el punto al final
spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all("[,;]", ".") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*\\.\\s*\\.\\s*+", ".") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.{2,}", ".") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*\\.\\s*", ". ") %>%
      str_replace_all("([A-Za-zÁÉÍÓÚÜÑ0-9])\\.$", "\\1") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

# Eliminar puntos finales

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_replace_all("\\.$", "") %>%
      str_squish()
  )

# Todas las palabras despues de un punto inicien en mayuscula

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    locality = locality %>%
      str_split("\\.") %>%
      lapply(function(x) str_to_sentence(str_squish(x))) %>%
      sapply(function(x) paste(x, collapse = ". ")) %>%
      str_squish()
  )

# Marcar cambios en locality

spp_link <- spp_link %>%
  mutate(
    discardReason = ifelse(
      is.na(discardReason) | discardReason == "",
      "change: general corrections applied to locality",
      paste(discardReason, "change: general corrections applied to locality")
    )
  )

write.csv(spp_link, file = "data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__assis_i_2026_specieslink.csv")
```
